description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages install, analyze, test, coverage, build, deploy, and report using the node:11 Docker image (node:8 for coverage) and a cache of node_modules/ and yarn.lock. Add an install job that runs 'yarn' then creates coverage and .nyc_output directories, stores node_modules, coverage, and .nyc_output as artifacts for 1 hour. Define three analyze jobs (analyze:flow, analyze:lint, analyze:react-lint) that depend on install, run on node:11 only on the develop branch, each executing 'yarn build-css' followed by 'yarn flow', 'yarn lint', or 'yarn react-scripts-build' respectively in the analyze stage. Add a test:unit job depending on install that runs 'yarn test:coverage:unit' on node:11 and saves the same artifacts for 1 hour, a coverage:collect job depending on test:unit that runs on node:8 executing 'yarn test:coverage:collect' and publishes the coverage directory as a 1‑day artifact, and a pages job in the report stage that depends on coverage:collect, runs only on develop, moves coverage files into public/, renames gitlab_page.html to index.html, and keeps the public/ artifact for 30 days, always. Create dev:build and prod:build jobs (only develop and only master) that replace the JWT secret using $JWT_SECRET_DEV or $JWT_SECRET_PROD, run 'yarn' and 'yarn build', and store the build directory as a 1‑day artifact, and corresponding dev:deploy and prod:deploy jobs (only develop/master) that depend on their builds, use the registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/cloud-deploy/aws-base:latest image, and deploy the build to the respective S3 bucket with 'aws s3 sync ./build/ s3://dev.socrates-conference.de --acl public-read --delete' or 'aws s3 sync ./build/ s3://socrates-conference.de --acl public-read --delete'.
